title: WC vs. EC | Spring Jacket Edition
excerpt: It's been a while, but KP thought it would be cute to do a spring jacket edition of WC vs. EC. She's now living in the midwest in Chicago, but we love the logo she created so much, we are…
body:
It's been a while, but KP thought it would be cute to do a spring jacket edition of WC vs. EC. She's now living in the midwest in Chicago, but we love the logo she created so much, we are sticking with this for a while. And I am still in Australia at the moment, so it kind of screws everything up anyway. Spring in LA can get a bit chilly, but it's also the last chance for me to wear this tweed jacket. The 3/4 length sleeves are too short to wear in really cold winters, so I like to break it out in the Spring. It's playful and fun, and even more so when paired with polka dotted pants. I'm still wearing pants from my closet, thanks to the amazing BeBand from Target.

Photos by Ann-Marie Morris

Yim jacket (from Barneys purchased about 7-8 years ago) || shirt from GAP || Pants and BeBand from Target || shoes by Converse || bump that's about 18 weeks
